task: Verify Todo 4 validate_modes root-ADB fix and targeted validation artifacts without running another broad campaign

commands.purpose: Validate shell syntax for the patched validator
Inspect the root-ADB patch and per-run diagnostic additions
commands.result: PASS; diff adds adb shell id -u detection, adb_as_root plain-shell path for uid 0, su fallback otherwise, and per-run artifacts under reference/validate_modes/<mode>/run<k>/

commands.command: timeout 30s adb shell 'id; command -v su || true; su -c id 2>&1 || true' | tr -d '\r'
commands.result: PASS; adb shell id reports uid=0(root) context=u:r:su:s0, and su reports '/system/bin/sh: su: inaccessible or not found'

commands.command: for f in reference/validate_modes/photo/run*/verdict.txt reference/validate_modes/text/run*/verdict.txt reference/validate_modes/scandoc/run*/verdict.txt; do printf '%s\t' "$f"; stat -c '%y\t%s bytes\t' "$f"; sed -n '1,5p' "$f"; done

root_adb_context.conclusion: Hardcoded adb shell su -c is a false-failure wrapper in this context; the patch's plain adb shell path is required.

adversarial_classes.stale_state: Evidence mtimes postdate validate_modes.sh source mtime and are from the same 2026-06-16 validation window; smoke per-run files were overwritten by the later K=3 run, but smoke summary remains preserved.
adversarial_classes.dirty_worktree: Tracked source diff is limited to tools/observability/campaign/validate_modes.sh; .omo/evidence/v15-camera-build is untracked evidence; unrelated untracked condition env files are present.
adversarial_classes.misleading_success_output: Root-wrapper false failure is distinguished from SCAN DOCS: photo/text pass with per-run diagnostics, scandoc fails with missing marker/nav/foreground diagnostics.
adversarial_classes.hung_commands: No lingering capture process remains; process scan matched only the audit command shell and rg.
adversarial_classes.repeated_interruptions: Per-run diagnostics exist for completed photo/text/scandoc runs; video8k partial run2 indicates interruption but is outside this targeted claim.
adversarial_classes.flaky_tests: Observed reach rates: photo 3/3, text 3/3, scandoc 0/3.
adversarial_classes.cancel_resume: N/A; no active campaign was resumed or cancelled by this audit.

cleanup.reason: No smoke or broad campaign was launched during this audit.
cleanup.remaining_processes: None beyond the process-check command itself.

risks: Existing validate-modes-fixed-full.txt is a summary from a broad run the user objected to; this audit did not rerun it and treats it only as existing evidence.
SCAN DOCS remains a real targeted failure and should not be reported as fixed by the root-ADB wrapper change.
The reference/validate_modes tree includes partial video8k artifacts from an interrupted run; the requested photo/text/scandoc evidence is complete.
Unrelated untracked condition env files remain in the worktree and were not modified.
